title: [App] Flamingo/Spoonbill - Connect headset as standalone
scenario: Unpaired Flamingo/Spoonbill headset connects to Poly Studio Mobile app as standalone, showing only headset battery and headset-only software update info
steps: 1. Ensure the Poly Voyager Legend 50 or Poly Voyager Legend 30 headset is NOT paired with its charge case.
2. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
3. On the Home screen, verify the device is connected and appears as a standalone headset.
4. Observe the battery indicator displayed on the Home screen.
5. Tap the device name to open Device Settings.
7. Observe the information displayed on the Software Update screen.
expected: Only the headset battery indicator is shown on the Home screen. In Settings > Software Update, only headset-related information (e.g., headset firmware version, headset update status) is displayed; no charge case information should appear.
